name: CHICAGO RIVET & MACHINE CO
summary: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. is a manufacturer based in Warrenville, Illinois. The company produces rivets and operates rivet machine equipment. The filing references executive compensation, security ownership, and governance disclosures, but limited product detail is provided in this section. The company has no equity compensation plans and files annual reports with the SEC under ticker CVR.
